facts.claim: Costa Toscana is an Excellence-class cruise ship currently operated by the Italian cruise line Costa Cruises, a subsidiary of Carnival Corporation & plc.
Costa Toscana has a sister ship, Costa Smeralda, which had been delivered in 2019.
At 186,364 gross tonnage (GT), she is the largest ship commissioned for and to ever operate for Costa, and the 12th-largest cruise ship in the world, as of 2025.
